definition: Diseases, symptoms, syndromes, phenotypic features, signs, disorders, or pathological conditions in organisms.
Chemical compounds, drugs, small molecules, elements, therapeutic substances, toxins, or chemical groups.
Genetic variants, mutations, polymorphisms, alleles, codons, or sequence changes in DNA/RNA.
Genes, proteins, glycoproteins, transcripts, RNA, DNA sequences, or gene products.
Established cell lines, primary cell cultures, or biological cell preparations used in research.
Organisms, species, strains, animal models, human subjects, or specific taxonomic groups.
